name: Hope Valley

locations.address:
Buxton Enquiry Office,
Silverlands, 
Buxton, 
Derbyshire,

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers the Hope Valley, including Castleton, Hope, Edale, Bamford and Derwent. It belongs to the High Peak Local Policing Unit. The Hope Valley neighbourhood is a large rural area. It encompasses the villages of Castleton, Hope, Edale, Bamford, Derwent, Shatton, and Brough, all of which vary in size. This whole area attracts thousands of visitors over the summer months who provide a real boost to the local economy.
